programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: Examine an upsized upgrade that’s been nothing but trouble for a young family.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: Sniff out the problems a couple missed by agreeing to a no-inspection clause.

programme.title: Lien on Me
programme.desc: See the Holmes on Homes crew fix a financial mess left by a shady contractor.

programme.title: Sarah off the Grid
programme.desc: Marvel as Sarah juggles two huge projects as her daughters take on design duty.

programme.title: Sarah off the Grid
programme.desc: Monitor progress in the principal suite as moving day moves to the new year.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Size up the costs of fixing the extensive damage caused by an illegal grow op.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Flush away the rubble of two terrible, unfinished accessible bathroom renos.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Hum along as a country-singing guest star helps Mike make this kitchen right.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Suss out why the beauty of a newly remodelled bathroom is only skin deep.

programme.title: Mike's Ultimate Garage
programme.desc: Race to finish the exterior with Mike Jr. before the first snow of the season.

programme.title: Mike's Ultimate Garage
programme.desc: Juggle tensions and final tweaks as Mike’s dream space finally comes to life.

programme.title: Derelict Rescue
programme.desc: Battle decades of decay as a brave couple restores a 500-year-old farmhouse.

programme.title: Derelict Rescue
programme.desc: Embark on a rural adventure as an ex-farmer overhauls a smelly, crumbling barn.

programme.title: Derelict Rescue
programme.desc: Go full tilt as two reno rookies create an upside-down home for their family.

programme.title: Derelict Rescue
programme.desc: Gamble on a ramshackle family heirloom as two urbanites create a country oasis.

programme.title: Extreme Collectors
programme.desc: In this episode Andrew is in L.A., where he is left speechless by actor Corbin Bernsen’s jaw-dropping collection of 8,000 snow globes!

programme.title: Extreme Collectors
programme.desc: In this episode Andrew is in Dallas, Texas, where everything is bigger… starting with a house full of thousands of action figures.

programme.title: Extreme Collectors
programme.desc: In this episode Andrew is in Las Vegas! In the city famous for its glitz and glamour.

programme.title: Extreme Collectors
programme.desc: In this episode Andrew is in Toronto, where he first visits an incredible retro collection that includes a 50’s era diner and a garage full of vintage cars.

programme.title: Extreme Collectors
programme.desc: In this episode Andrew is in south Florida where he is blown away by the largest collection of yo-yo’s in the world.

programme.title: Extreme Collectors
programme.desc: In this episode Andrew is in L.A. where he is thrilled to get a chance to meet director Penny Marshall and get a rare glimpse into her one-of-a-kind collection of sports memorabilia.

programme.title: Extreme Collectors
programme.desc: In this episode Andrew is in Houston, where he gets a chance to visit some Texas-size collections.

programme.title: Extreme Collectors
programme.desc: In this episode Andrew is in Toronto, and he steps back in time when he enters a grand building showcasing an incredible collection of vintage Cadillacs.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Race to shore up basement walls that are 66 percent weaker than they should be.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Get a load of a rotted-out balcony that only Mike’s team is willing to take on.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Say goodbye to a financial nightmare as Mike resolves some unfinished business.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Enjoy Mike’s rock-solid fixes for a rickety garden wall and an AWOL contractor.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Head up to the roof as Mike rebuilds an attic that’s missing a crucial support.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Size up the costs of fixing the extensive damage caused by an illegal grow op.

programme.title: Sarah off the Grid
programme.desc: Assess risk as Sarah asks Mike Holmes for advice, then visit a high-up hideaway.

programme.title: Sarah off the Grid
programme.desc: Probe Sarah and Alex’s solar energy options and kick back in comfy guest spaces.

programme.title: Sarah off the Grid
programme.desc: Marvel as Sarah juggles two huge projects as her daughters take on design duty.

programme.title: Sarah off the Grid
programme.desc: Monitor progress in the principal suite as moving day moves to the new year.

programme.title: Sarah off the Grid
programme.desc: Face down major frustrations as Sarah puts finishing touches on the main floor.

programme.title: Sarah off the Grid
programme.desc: Brave bad weather and delays to put the final touches on the house and barn.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: Dig up fixes to home-inspection misses that buoy a dog-loving couple’s spirits.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: Buckle up as the team tackles a chaotic house bought without a home inspection.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: Say goodbye to leaky windows and a freezing family room in a sweet new home.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: Deal with the consequences when a first-time buyer skips her home inspection.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Find out why a guest room is always frigid and warm up to Mike’s simple fix.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: Face a newlywed duo’s droopy deck and a foundation crack their inspector missed.
